title: ayapana pyramidalis
intro: Ayapana pyramidalis, also known as Eclipta alba or False Daisy, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and promoting wound healing. Ayapana pyramidalis is typically used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
